```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
s = [int(b) for b in hidden_period]

total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    bits = [int(b) for b in bitstring.replace(" ", "")]
    assert len(bits) == len(s)
    dot_mod_2 = sum(b * p for b, p in zip(bits, s)) % 2
    assert dot_mod_2 == 0
    total += count

assert total == shots
assert total > 0
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
s = [int(b) for b in hidden_period]
```
```python
n = len(s)

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, (total, shots)
assert n == 2

for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    assert count >= 0
    bits = [int(b) for b in bitstring[-n:]]
    dot_mod2 = sum(b * t for b, t in zip(bits, s)) % 2
    assert dot_mod2 == 0, (bitstring, hidden_period)
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
s_bits = [int(b) for b in hidden_period]
assert len(s_bits) == 2

total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    bits = [int(b) for b in str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")]
    assert len(bits) == len(s_bits)
    dot_mod_2 = sum(b * s for b, s in zip(bits, s_bits)) % 2
    assert dot_mod_2 == 0
    total += count

assert total == shots
assert set(str(k).replace(" ", "") for k in counts).issubset({"00", "11"})
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
s = [int(b) for b in hidden_period]

total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    bits = [int(b) for b in bitstring.replace(" ", "")]
    assert len(bits) == len(s), f"Unexpected sample length: {bitstring}"
    dot_mod_2 = sum(b * si for b, si in zip(bits, s)) % 2
    assert dot_mod_2 == 0, f"Sample {bitstring} violates y·s = 0 mod 2 for s={hidden_period}"
    total += count

assert total == shots, f"Counts total {total} does not match shots {shots}"
assert len(counts) > 0
```

```python
hidden = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
n = len(hidden)
assert n == 2
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == n
    dot = sum((int(s[i]) & int(hidden[i])) for i in range(n)) % 2
    assert dot == 0
    assert c >= 0
assert set(str(k).replace(" ", "") for k in counts).issubset({"00", "11"})
```

```python
hidden = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
assert hidden == "11"
total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")
    x = s[-len(hidden):]
    assert len(x) == len(hidden)
    dot_mod_2 = sum(int(a) & int(b) for a, b in zip(x, hidden)) % 2
    assert dot_mod_2 == 0, f"Sample {bitstring} violates x·s = 0 mod 2 for s={hidden}"
    total += count
assert total == shots
assert total > 0
```

```python
hidden = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
n = len(hidden)
total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    s = str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")
    s = s[-n:]
    assert len(s) == n
    dot = sum(int(a) * int(b) for a, b in zip(s, hidden)) % 2
    assert dot == 0, f"Measured sample {s} violates y·s=0 for hidden period {hidden}"
    total += count
assert total == shots, f"Counts total {total} does not match shots {shots}"
assert counts, "Counts should not be empty"
```

```python
hidden = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
n = len(hidden)
assert n == 2
assert counts, "counts must not be empty"

total = 0
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) >= n
    measured = s[-n:]
    dot = sum(int(measured[i]) * int(hidden[i]) for i in range(n)) % 2
    assert dot == 0, f"sample {measured} violates y·s=0 for hidden period {hidden}"
    total += c

assert total == shots, f"total counted shots {total} != shots {shots}"
```

```python
hidden = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
assert hidden == "11"
total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots
allowed = {"00", "11"}
assert set(counts).issubset(allowed)
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    assert len(bitstring) == len(hidden)
    dot = sum(int(a) * int(b) for a, b in zip(bitstring, hidden)) % 2
    assert dot == 0
    assert c >= 0
assert sum(counts.get(s, 0) for s in allowed) == shots
```

```python
hidden = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
assert hidden == "11"
total = 0
for bitstring, c in counts.items():
    s = str(bitstring).replace(" ", "")
    assert len(s) == len(hidden)
    dot_mod_2 = sum((int(a) & int(b)) for a, b in zip(s, hidden)) % 2
    assert dot_mod_2 == 0, (bitstring, c)
    total += c
assert total == shots
assert set(str(k).replace(" ", "") for k in counts) <= {"00", "11"}
```

```python
hidden_period = metadata.get("hidden_period", "11")
n = len(hidden_period)
s_bits = [int(b) for b in hidden_period]

total = 0
for bitstring, count in counts.items():
    bits = [int(b) for b in bitstring[-n:]]
    dot_mod_2 = sum(b * s for b, s in zip(bits, s_bits)) % 2
    assert dot_mod_2 == 0, f"Invalid Simon sample {bitstring} for hidden period {hidden_period}"
    total += count

assert total == shots, f"Counts total {total} does not match shots {shots}"
assert len(counts) > 0
```
